2: For unto thee will I pray.
3: In the morning will I direct my prayer my prayer unto thee, and will look up.
4: Neither shall evil dwell with thee.
5: Thou hatest all workers of iniquity.
6: The LORD LORD will abhor the bloody and deceitful man.
7: And And in thy fear will I worship toward thy holy temple.
8: Make thy way straight before my face.
10: Cast them out in the multitude of their transgressions; for they have rebelled against thee.
11: Let them ever shout for joy, because thou defendest them: let them also that love thy name be joyful in thee.
12: With favour wilt thou compass him as with with a shield.
